creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2012-04-10 16:39:32 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/p5-MooseX-HasDefaults Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                pkg-plist 
  Log:
  The module MooseX::HasDefaults::RO defaults is to ro.
  
  The module MooseX::HasDefaults::RW defaults is to rw.
  
  If you pass a specific value to any has's is, that overrides the default. If
  you do not want an accessor, pass is => undef.
  
  WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/dist/MooseX-HasDefaults/
  
  PR:             ports/166591
  Submitted by:   Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.4920    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +24 -0     ports/devel/p5-MooseX-HasDefaults/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/devel/p5-MooseX-HasDefaults/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/devel/p5-MooseX-HasDefaults/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +11 -0     ports/devel/p5-MooseX-HasDefaults/pkg-plist (new)
